title: Deja Vu
description: A familiar pressure hangs in the air, the weight of countless failures sit heavy upon your shoulders.
intro: A cold white hand grasps your shoulder.
rewardPrompt: Player {{player}}, choose one Pokemon to bring back.
skipReward: Player {{player}} puts the past to rest.
obtainedPokemon: {{pokemonName}} seems relieved to see you again
outro: The cold fades away, leaving only the road ahead.

1.label: [SAVE]
1.selected: Player {{player}} turns to face their past. A set of familiar, hollow eyes stares back.

2.label: [PROCEED]
2.selected: {{player}} refuses to dwell on the past.
